title: anthoxanthum fraseri
intro: Anthoxanthum fraseri, also known as Fraser's bent grass or sweet grass, is a type of flowering plant native to the eastern United States. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a natural remedy for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of anthoxanthum fraseri include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to make poultices and salves for topical application.
